segments.text: In the middle of the desert, miles from
any city, are these huge concrete tubes
[music] that are part of a giant machine
running the most precise experiment
humans have ever built. The experiment
is happening inside two tubes, each 4 km
long. And inside each tube, there's a
big metal pipe. And inside the pipe is
nothing. There are fewer particles here
than the International Space Station
flies through. And at the end of each
pipe, scientists place some of the
smoothest mirrors ever made. and then
fire a powerful laser that gets split
down each tube, bouncing back and forth,
building up more and more power until
finally they bring those beams back
together to discover something that a
100red years before [music] scientists
said was impossible to find. Waves from
massive things like black holes
colliding [music] way out in space. But
they did it. to go inside this machine.
